task_snapshots.title: 382-05: Final migration + tagging + integration tests
task_snapshots.description:
Complete git integration:
- Migrate remaining files: src/bernstein/core/worktree.py, src/bernstein/evolution/sandbox.py, src/bernstein/core/upgrade_executor.py
- Add to git_ops.py: create_tag(tag_name, message), version_from_commits() for semantic versioning
- Write integration test combining git_ops and git_context (e.g., workflow: create branch → stage → commit → push → tag)
- Verify all git operations centralized, no stray subprocess.run(["git", ...]) calls remain

Completion: integration test passes, all migrations complete, version tagging works.

[subtask of 28550c616824]
